case_title: LORENA ALVAREZ VS. JANE DOE ET AL

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR FOR FEE WAIVER HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALVAREZ, LORENA HEARING SET FOR JAN-13-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF ALVAREZ, LORENA AS TO DEFENDANT DOE, JANE DOE, JOHN ALL OTHER OCCUPANTS

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALVAREZ, LORENA AS TO DEFENDANT DOE, JANE DOE, JOHN ALL OTHER OCCUPANTS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALVAREZ, LORENA
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALVAREZ, LORENA AS TO DEFENDANT DOE, JANE DOE, JOHN ALL OTHER OCCUPANTS

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JAN-13-2016 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF LORENA ALVAREZ' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
